'''zhodanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:meaded|meaded]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-d-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:meaded|meaded]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhodanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhodanithi|zhodanithi]] || [[word:zhodaniji|zhodaniji]] || [[word:zhodanishi|zhodanishi]] || [[word:zhodaniki|zhodaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhodanuthuthu|zhodanuthuthu]] || [[word:zhodanujuju|zhodanujuju]] || [[word:zhodanushushu|zhodanushushu]] || [[word:zhodanukuku|zhodanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhodanuthu|zhodanuthu]] || [[word:zhodanuju|zhodanuju]] || [[word:zhodanushu|zhodanushu]] || [[word:zhodanuku|zhodanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhodanufthuf|zhodanufthuf]] || [[word:zhodanufjuf|zhodanufjuf]] || [[word:zhodanufshuf|zhodanufshuf]] || [[word:zhodanufkuf|zhodanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhodanethe|zhodanethe]] || [[word:zhodaneje|zhodaneje]] || [[word:zhodaneshe|zhodaneshe]] || [[word:zhodaneke|zhodaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhodanothotho|zhodanothotho]] || [[word:zhodanojojo|zhodanojojo]] || [[word:zhodanoshosho|zhodanoshosho]] || [[word:zhodanokoko|zhodanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhodanotho|zhodanotho]] || [[word:zhodanojo|zhodanojo]] || [[word:zhodanosho|zhodanosho]] || [[word:zhodanoko|zhodanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhodanofthof|zhodanofthof]] || [[word:zhodanofjof|zhodanofjof]] || [[word:zhodanofshof|zhodanofshof]] || [[word:zhodanofkof|zhodanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhodanïfthïf|zhodanïfthïf]] || [[word:zhodanïfjïf|zhodanïfjïf]] || [[word:zhodanïfshïf|zhodanïfshïf]] || [[word:zhodanïfkïf|zhodanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhodanïfthïfthïf|zhodanïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:zhodanïfjïfjïf|zhodanïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:zhodanïfshïfshïf|zhodanïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:zhodanïfkïfkïf|zhodanïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhodanïfthïf|zhodanïfthïf]] || [[word:zhodanïfjïf|zhodanïfjïf]] || [[word:zhodanïfshïf|zhodanïfshïf]] || [[word:zhodanïfkïf|zhodanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhodanïfthïf|zhodanïfthïf]] || [[word:zhodanïfjïf|zhodanïfjïf]] || [[word:zhodanïfshïf|zhodanïfshïf]] || [[word:zhodanïfkïf|zhodanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhodanæthæ|zhodanæthæ]] || [[word:zhodanæjæ|zhodanæjæ]] || [[word:zhodanæshæ|zhodanæshæ]] || [[word:zhodanækæ|zhodanækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhodanathatha|zhodanathatha]] || [[word:zhodanajaja|zhodanajaja]] || [[word:zhodanashasha|zhodanashasha]] || [[word:zhodanakaka|zhodanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhodanatha|zhodanatha]] || [[word:zhodanaja|zhodanaja]] || [[word:zhodanasha|zhodanasha]] || [[word:zhodanaka|zhodanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhodanafthaf|zhodanafthaf]] || [[word:zhodanafjaf|zhodanafjaf]] || [[word:zhodanafshaf|zhodanafshaf]] || [[word:zhodanafkaf|zhodanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhodanasha|zhodanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhodanshësha|zhodanshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhodanrosha|zhodanrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhodanmusha|zhodanmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhodanyasha|zhodanyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhodankshësha|gozhodankshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhodankrosha|gozhodankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhodankmusha|gozhodankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhodankyasha|gozhodankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhodadanasha|zhodadanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhodadanshësha|zhodadanshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhodadanrosha|zhodadanrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhodadanmusha|zhodadanmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhodadanyasha|zhodadanyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhodadankshësha|gozhodadankshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhodadankrosha|gozhodadankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhodadankmusha|gozhodadankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhodadankyasha|gozhodadankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhedænasha|zhedænasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhedænshësha|zhedænshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhedænrosha|zhedænrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhedænmusha|zhedænmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhedænyasha|zhedænyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhedænkshësha|gozhedænkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhedænkrosha|gozhedænkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhedænkmusha|gozhedænkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhedænkyasha|gozhedænkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhodfanasha|zhodfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhodfanshësha|zhodfanshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhodfanrosha|zhodfanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhodfanmusha|zhodfanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhodfanyasha|zhodfanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhodfankshësha|gozhodfankshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhodfankrosha|gozhodfankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhodfankmusha|gozhodfankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhodfankyasha|gozhodfankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
